'''M-3PO-C''' was a [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] who was stationed at the [[Hyperbaride/Legends|hyperbaride]] [[DSI Hyperbaride Synthesis Plant|plant]] on [[Marca/Legends|Marca]] by [[Dynamic Synergetics, Inc.]] when the factory had first opened.

==Biography==
M-3PO-C was owned by [[Arviz Linden]] and used as his secretary. Linden kept the plant's production at a minimum to protect the [[Sekct]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and M-3PO-C admired him for that. The droid was dismayed upon learning of his [[Death/Legends|death]]. After [[Vost Tyne]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] overtook [[Marca/Legends|Marca]], M-3PO-C was reassigned to managing the housekeeping [[Droid/Legends|droids]] at the plant. When [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agents crashed on Marca and decided to help the native Sekct, M-3PO-C happily assisted the agents while they were on the planet.

{{Droid-stub}}
